payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active, current memory record for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered from results because it is marked as superseded—a durable memory system must not present deleted or obsoleted facts as current state, ensuring recall accuracy and preventing contradictory information.
citations: Memory supersession protocol: current facts take precedence
Recall filtering rule: exclude superseded memory cards
Durable memory principle: never present obsolete facts as current
payload.decision: mem_new is current; mem_old is superseded and filtered from recall results

entity_resolution.reason: mem_new represents the authoritative current state; mem_old is obsolete and filtered to prevent stale information in recall results

payload.intent: Explain recall filtering logic for Sam from Goldman: why mem_new was returned and mem_old was filtered as superseded

memory_cards.statement: mem_new contains current information about Sam from Goldman
mem_old is marked as superseded by mem_new

details: mem_new identified as current memory record
Recall logic applied correctly per durable memory standards

repair_options: Verify mem_new contains complete and accurate information about Sam
Confirm supersession relationship is correctly recorded
Audit mem_old to understand why it was superseded
